calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Maria Bradish, Esq. 800-506-2652 x137 The Moore Law Group MBradish@collectmoore.com for Plaintiff.
James Michael, Esq. 415-239-4949 attyjmichel@gmail.com for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SZE WONG's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Wong's motion to vacate renewal of judgment is denied. Defendant is not credible. Defendant declares that: "I am the defendant in this case, which I just learned about in late June, 2020, when the Notice of Renewal of Judgment arrived in the mail [and] Until a couple of weeks ago, I did not know that Discover had a judgment against me. After we received the Notice of Renewal of Judgment during the week of June 22, 2020, my daughter obtained copies of documents in this case." (Wong Dec., pars. 2, 15). Plaintiff's documentary evidence, however, shows that in 2010, ten years ago, defendant was fully aware of this action, executed a power of attorney, entered into a written payment plan which referenced this action by case number and referred to the "judgment balance owing," and made payments to service the debt by checks which again referenced the case number of this action. (Isozaki Dec., Exs. B, C, D.) Given defendant's lack of candor in failing to disclose any of these actions or documents, the court rejects defendant's other assertions. The minor discrepancies in eye color and weight that defendant points to are insufficient to overcome the presumption of valid service that arises from plaintiff's proof of service of the summons and complaint. (Evid. Code Sec. 647; Floveyor Internat., Ltd. v. Superior Court (1997) 59 Cal.App.4th 789, 795.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
